examples.sentence: During the crisis meeting, Jenna decided to leave it all on the field, presenting her ideas with full conviction despite the risks.
examples.translation: During the crisis meeting, Jenna decided to act with complete commitment, presenting her ideas with full conviction despite the risks.

examples.sentence: If you leave it all on the field in your negotiation, you might lose the deal, but at least you'll know you gave it everything.
examples.translation: If you act with complete commitment in your negotiation, you might lose the deal, but at least you'll know you gave it everything.

examples.sentence: He left it all on the field during the court case, accepting whatever outcome came from his total effort.
examples.translation: He acted with complete commitment during the court case, accepting whatever outcome came from his total effort.

examples.sentence: Maria always leaves it all on the field when working on her art projects, pouring every ounce of creativity into each piece.
examples.translation: Maria always gives everything she has in working on her art projects, pouring every ounce of creativity into each piece.

examples.sentence: I’m going to leave it all on the field during this final presentation; nothing will be held back.
examples.translation: I’m going to give everything I have during this final presentation; nothing will be held back.

examples.sentence: They left it all on the field to secure the deal, exhausting every possible resource and idea.
examples.translation: They gave everything they had to secure the deal, exhausting every possible resource and idea.

examples.sentence: The soldiers left it all on the field, pushing their physical limits during the grueling training exercises.
examples.translation: The soldiers put forth all their strength and effort during the grueling training exercises.

examples.sentence: Despite the harsh weather, the firefighters left it all on the field battling the blaze until it was fully controlled.
examples.translation: Despite the harsh weather, the firefighters put forth all their strength and effort battling the blaze until it was fully controlled.

examples.sentence: The team left it all on the field in the championship game, showing unmatched determination until the final whistle.
examples.translation: The team put forth all their strength and effort in the championship game, showing unmatched determination until the final whistle.

examples.sentence: Every volunteer left it all on the field during the disaster relief operation, working tirelessly to help those affected.
examples.translation: Every volunteer put forth all their strength and effort during the disaster relief operation, working tirelessly to help those affected.

examples.sentence: I told Tim to leave it alone when he started fiddling with the old radio—it’s delicate and doesn’t need any repairs.
examples.translation: I told Tim to stop touching the old radio—it’s delicate and doesn’t need any repairs.

examples.sentence: Please leave the painting alone; it’s an original and any interference might damage it.
examples.translation: Please stop interfering with the painting; it’s an original and any interference might damage it.

examples.sentence: She decided to leave the broken vase alone rather than risk making the damage worse.
examples.translation: She decided to stop touching the broken vase rather than risk making the damage worse.

examples.sentence: We argued enough about the budget; let’s just leave it alone and move on to other matters.
examples.translation: We argued enough about the budget; let’s just refrain from discussing it and move on to other matters.

examples.sentence: After realizing the topic was too sensitive, Jenna chose to leave it alone and avoid further conflict.
examples.translation: After realizing the topic was too sensitive, Jenna chose to refrain from discussing it and avoid further conflict.

examples.sentence: Why don’t you leave it alone? Some things are better left undiscussed.
examples.translation: Why don’t you refrain from pursuing that topic? Some things are better left undiscussed.

examples.sentence: When offered the deal, he was indifferent and told them to take it or leave it—he would leave it alone either way.
examples.translation: When offered the deal, he was indifferent and told them to take it or leave it—he would accept or reject it without concern.

examples.sentence: I don’t really care about their opinion; I’ll just leave it alone and focus on my own work.
examples.translation: I don’t really care about their opinion; I’ll just be indifferent and focus on my own work.

examples.sentence: She decided to leave it alone, neither accepting nor rejecting the invitation outright.
examples.translation: She decided to be indifferent, neither accepting nor rejecting the invitation outright.

examples.sentence: We left the old clock alone on the shelf, not wanting to disturb its fragile mechanism.
examples.translation: We stopped touching the old clock on the shelf, not wanting to disturb its fragile mechanism.

examples.sentence: Don’t touch the documents; just leave them alone where they are on the desk.
examples.translation: Don’t touch the documents; just stop changing them and let them remain on the desk.

examples.sentence: The technician recommended leaving the system alone until the update was complete.
examples.translation: The technician recommended not interfering with the system until the update was complete.

examples.sentence: Because the painting was so sensitive to light, the museum staff decided to leave it alone in a dim room.
examples.translation: Because the painting was so sensitive to light, the museum staff decided to stop disturbing it and keep it in a dim room.

examples.sentence: After a long debate, the committee agreed to leave it at that and proceed with the plan as is.
examples.translation: After a long debate, the committee agreed to stop discussing the matter and accept the plan as is.

examples.sentence: When Sarah realized no one wanted to argue further, she decided to leave it at that and change the subject.
examples.translation: When Sarah realized no one wanted to argue further, she decided to stop discussing the topic and change the subject.

examples.sentence: Let’s leave it at that for now; we can revisit the issue if new information comes up.
examples.translation: Let’s stop discussing it for now; we can revisit the issue if new information comes up.

examples.sentence: I’ll just leave it at that without explaining the details—some things are better kept simple.
examples.translation: I’ll refrain from elaborating further without explaining the details—some things are better kept simple.

examples.sentence: He left it at that, choosing not to pursue the topic any further in the meeting.
examples.translation: He refrained from pursuing the topic any further in the meeting.

examples.sentence: After giving her brief answer, she left it at that and didn’t offer any more information.
examples.translation: After giving her brief answer, she refrained from elaborating and didn’t offer any more information.

examples.sentence: During the interview, when asked about his past, he decided to leave it at that and not elaborate.
examples.translation: During the interview, when asked about his past, he decided to stop talking about it and not elaborate.

examples.sentence: Let’s leave it at that for today; we can continue this conversation tomorrow.
examples.translation: Let’s stop talking about it for today; we can continue this conversation tomorrow.

examples.sentence: After a lengthy discussion, she left it at that, signaling the end of the topic.
examples.translation: After a lengthy discussion, she stopped talking about it, signaling the end of the topic.

examples.sentence: They left it at that to avoid any unnecessary tension during the family dinner.
examples.translation: They stopped talking about it to avoid any unnecessary tension during the family dinner.

examples.sentence: The mechanic finally left it be, deciding not to tinker with the engine any further.
examples.translation: The mechanic stopped interfering with the engine, deciding not to tinker with it any further.

examples.sentence: When the cat hid under the couch, we chose to leave it be until it felt safe to come out.
examples.translation: When the cat hid under the couch, we chose to stop disturbing it until it felt safe to come out.

examples.sentence: I think it’s best to leave the old tree be; it’s part of the neighborhood’s charm.
examples.translation: I think it’s best to stop disturbing the old tree; it’s part of the neighborhood’s charm.

examples.sentence: They left the abandoned house be, respecting its history and not interfering with it.
examples.translation: They stopped disturbing the abandoned house, respecting its history and not interfering with it.

examples.sentence: After the argument, John decided to leave it be and not bring up the subject again.
examples.translation: After the argument, John decided to stop discussing the subject and not bring it up again.

examples.sentence: We agreed to leave it be to avoid causing more trouble in the office.
examples.translation: We agreed to stop mentioning the topic to avoid causing more trouble in the office.

examples.sentence: She left it be, choosing not to mention her friend's mistake during the meeting.
examples.translation: She stopped discussing her friend's mistake during the meeting.

examples.sentence: The children were told to leave the garden be so the flowers could grow undisturbed.
examples.translation: The children were told to stop disturbing the garden so the flowers could grow undisturbed.

examples.sentence: Please leave the documents be; they are important and should not be touched.
examples.translation: Please stop interfering with the documents; they are important and should not be touched.

examples.sentence: He left the sleeping dog be, careful not to wake it up during the afternoon nap.
examples.translation: He stopped disturbing the sleeping dog, careful not to wake it up during the afternoon nap.

examples.sentence: The archaeologists decided to leave the ancient site be until further study was planned.
examples.translation: The archaeologists stopped interfering with the ancient site until further study was planned.

examples.sentence: After finishing her sandwich, Emma made sure to leave no crumbs on the table.
examples.translation: After finishing her sandwich, Emma made sure to eat so thoroughly that no crumbs were left on the table.

examples.sentence: He cleaned up after the picnic, leaving no crumbs behind on the blanket.
examples.translation: He cleaned up after the picnic, eating or clearing food so thoroughly that no crumbs remained on the blanket.

examples.sentence: Don’t worry about the kids; they never leave no crumbs when they eat cookies around here.
examples.translation: Don’t worry about the kids; they always eat cookies so thoroughly that no crumbs are left around here.

examples.sentence: She always leaves no crumbs on her plate, making sure everything is eaten completely.
examples.translation: She always eats her food so thoroughly that no crumbs remain on her plate.

examples.sentence: The spy was careful to leave no crumbs that could reveal his identity after the mission.
examples.translation: The spy was careful to leave nothing behind that could reveal his identity after the mission.

examples.sentence: When cleaning out her computer, she left no crumbs of old files that might compromise her privacy.
examples.translation: When cleaning out her computer, she removed all traces of old files that might compromise her privacy.

examples.sentence: The hacker left no crumbs after breaching the system, erasing every bit of evidence.
examples.translation: The hacker left nothing behind after breaching the system, erasing every bit of evidence.

examples.sentence: Detectives left no stone unturned in their search for clues after the robbery.
examples.translation: Detectives searched thoroughly for clues after the robbery.

examples.sentence: We have to leave no stone unturned if we want to find the missing documents before the deadline.
examples.translation: We have to search thoroughly if we want to find the missing documents before the deadline.

examples.sentence: The research team left no stone unturned, exploring every possible avenue to solve the problem.
examples.translation: The research team searched thoroughly, exploring every possible avenue to solve the problem.

examples.sentence: They literally left no stone unturned while excavating the ancient ruins.
examples.translation: They literally searched thoroughly while excavating the ancient ruins.

examples.sentence: The hikers left no stone unturned in their search for the lost trail markers.
examples.translation: The hikers searched thoroughly in their search for the lost trail markers.

examples.sentence: Engineers left no stone unturned inspecting every part of the bridge for weaknesses.
examples.translation: Engineers searched thoroughly inspecting every part of the bridge for weaknesses.

examples.sentence: During the cleanup, the volunteers left no stone unturned to remove all the debris from the park.
examples.translation: During the cleanup, the volunteers searched thoroughly to remove all the debris from the park.

examples.sentence: She decided to leave off writing the report for the day and continue tomorrow.
examples.translation: She decided to stop writing the report for the day and continue tomorrow.

examples.sentence: After hours of studying, he left off for a break to clear his head.
examples.translation: After hours of studying, he stopped for a break to clear his head.

examples.sentence: They will leave off construction next week due to the holiday schedule.
examples.translation: They will stop construction next week due to the holiday schedule.

examples.sentence: In the summary, the editor left off the less important details to keep it concise.
examples.translation: In the summary, the editor omitted the less important details to keep it concise.

examples.sentence: You can leave off the last item on the list if it’s not necessary for the presentation.
examples.translation: You can omit the last item on the list if it’s not necessary for the presentation.

examples.sentence: They left off mentioning the financial figures because they were confidential.
examples.translation: They omitted mentioning the financial figures because they were confidential.

examples.sentence: Let’s leave off where we stopped yesterday and pick up the discussion this afternoon.
examples.translation: Let’s indicate the point we stopped yesterday and resume the discussion this afternoon.

examples.sentence: He asked me to leave off at chapter five and continue reading later.
examples.translation: He asked me to indicate the point at chapter five where I stopped and continue reading later.

examples.sentence: We left off the meeting before lunch and planned to return after the break.
examples.translation: We stopped the meeting before lunch and planned to resume after the break.

examples.sentence: The ship left off from the harbor early this morning, headed for the island.
examples.translation: The ship departed from the harbor early this morning, headed for the island.

examples.sentence: They left off at dawn, eager to reach the next town before nightfall.
examples.translation: They departed at dawn, eager to reach the next town before nightfall.

examples.sentence: The caravan left off without warning, leaving the village behind.
examples.translation: The caravan departed without warning, leaving the village behind.

examples.sentence: She decided to leave off smoking after years of trying to quit.
examples.translation: She decided to stop smoking after years of trying to quit.

examples.sentence: We left off working on the project when the power went out unexpectedly.
examples.translation: We stopped working on the project when the power went out unexpectedly.

examples.sentence: He will leave off playing the piano for a while to focus on his studies.
examples.translation: He will stop playing the piano for a while to focus on his studies.

examples.sentence: They have left off using that software due to frequent glitches.
examples.translation: They have stopped using that software due to frequent glitches.

examples.sentence: The explorers left on their journey at dawn, full of hope and excitement.
examples.translation: The explorers departed on their journey at dawn, full of hope and excitement.

examples.sentence: She will leave on the trip tomorrow morning and won’t be back for two weeks.
examples.translation: She will depart on the trip tomorrow morning and won’t be back for two weeks.

examples.sentence: After saying goodbye, they left on the long voyage across the sea.
examples.translation: After saying goodbye, they departed on the long voyage across the sea.

examples.sentence: They have left on their expedition and are expected to return next month.
examples.translation: They have departed on their expedition and are expected to return next month.

examples.sentence: Don’t forget to turn off the lights when you leave; I think you left them on last night.
examples.translation: Don’t forget to turn off the lights when you leave; I think you left the lights switched on last night.

examples.sentence: She left the oven on while running errands, which worried her family.
examples.translation: She left the oven switched on while running errands, which worried her family.

examples.sentence: The heater was left on all night, causing the electricity bill to skyrocket.
examples.translation: The heater was left switched on all night, causing the electricity bill to skyrocket.

examples.sentence: Please make sure the TV is not left on after the guests leave.
examples.translation: Please make sure the TV is not left switched on after the guests leave.

examples.sentence: He left his jacket on even though the room was quite warm.
examples.translation: He kept his jacket on even though the room was quite warm.

examples.sentence: During the meeting, she left her glasses on to read the documents more clearly.
examples.translation: During the meeting, she kept her glasses on to read the documents more clearly.

examples.sentence: I usually leave my shoes on when I’m just relaxing at home.
examples.translation: I usually keep my shoes on when I’m just relaxing at home.

examples.sentence: He didn’t want to remove his watch, so he left it on throughout the event.
examples.translation: He didn’t want to remove his watch, so he kept it on throughout the event.

examples.sentence: Jessica was heartbroken when Mark left her at the altar just minutes before the ceremony.
examples.translation: Jessica was heartbroken when Mark abandoned her at the point of marriage just minutes before the ceremony.

examples.sentence: He couldn’t believe his friend would leave him at the altar after all the planning and promises.
examples.translation: He couldn’t believe his friend would abandon him at the point of marriage after all the planning and promises.

examples.sentence: The bride’s family was shocked when the groom left her at the altar without any explanation.
examples.translation: The bride’s family was shocked when the groom abandoned her at the point of marriage without any explanation.

examples.sentence: When the project fell apart, the manager left the team at the altar, refusing to support them through the crisis.
examples.translation: When the project fell apart, the manager abandoned the team at a critical moment, refusing to support them through the crisis.

examples.sentence: She felt betrayed when her partner left her at the altar of responsibility, ignoring all commitments.
examples.translation: She felt betrayed when her partner abandoned her at a critical moment of commitment, ignoring all responsibilities.

examples.sentence: Don’t leave me at the altar when the deadline comes; I need your help to finish this on time.
examples.translation: Don’t abandon me at a critical moment; I need your help to finish this on time.

examples.sentence: The groom left someone at the altar yesterday, causing a scandal in the small town.
examples.translation: The groom abandoned someone at the point of marriage yesterday, causing a scandal in the small town.

examples.sentence: She was left at the altar after her fiancé disappeared without a word.
examples.translation: She was abandoned at the point of marriage after her fiancé disappeared without a word.

examples.sentence: Leaving someone at the altar is one of the most heartbreaking experiences in a wedding.
examples.translation: Abandoning someone at the point of marriage is one of the most heartbreaking experiences in a wedding.

examples.sentence: The story of the man who left his bride at the altar made headlines across the country.
examples.translation: The story of the man who abandoned his bride at the point of marriage made headlines across the country.

examples.sentence: When the storm hit, the captain left the crew high and dry, abandoning them without any support.
examples.translation: When the storm hit, the captain abandoned the crew in a difficult situation without any support.

examples.sentence: She felt left high and dry when her colleagues didn’t show up to help with the presentation.
examples.translation: She felt abandoned in a helpless situation when her colleagues didn’t show up to help with the presentation.

examples.sentence: Don’t leave me high and dry during the crisis; we need to work together to solve this.
examples.translation: Don’t abandon me in a difficult situation during the crisis; we need to work together to solve this.

examples.sentence: He promised to assist with the project but left the team high and dry when he quit unexpectedly.
examples.translation: He promised to assist with the project but failed to fulfill his obligation, leaving the team to cope alone.

examples.sentence: The landlord left the tenants high and dry by not repairing the heating during the winter.
examples.translation: The landlord failed to fulfill his obligation by not repairing the heating, leaving the tenants to cope alone.

examples.sentence: I don’t want to leave you high and dry, so I’ll make sure to finish my part on time.
examples.translation: I don’t want to fail to fulfill my obligation, so I’ll make sure to finish my part on time.
